subject: Login Issue Since Last Update
body:
Hello Support,

I am writing to report a crash that occurs every time I switch accounts. I am using Xiaomi 14 running iOS 16.6, app version 3.0.0.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. Navigate to Notifications
3. Tap switch accounts
4. App crashes immediately

Please advise. This is affecting my daily workflow.

Regards,
Blake Brown

subject: App Keeps Freezing
body:
Hi,

Since updating to version 2.1.0, I can no longer search for items. I've tried uninstalling and reinstalling but the issue persists.
Device: OnePlus 12 | OS: Android 12

This is urgent for me. Please help.

Santiago Wilson

subject: Would Love to See This Feature
body:
Hello,

Just a quick suggestion: it would be great to have biometric login. Many of your competitors offer this and it would help retain users like me.

Cameron Harris

subject: Suggestion for Improvement
body:
Hello,

Just a quick suggestion: it would be great to have calendar integration. Many of your competitors offer this and it would help retain users like me.

subject: Feature Request: Dark Mode
body:

I've been using the app for 12 months and love it! One thing that would make it even better is biometric login. Would you consider adding this in a future update?

Thanks,
Cameron Brown
